cells.name: fly_insect
cells.notes: Grey/blue fly with two red compound eyes and pale translucent wings.

cells.name: green_beetle
cells.notes: Dark beetle with bright green markings on the carapace.

cells.name: brown_spider
cells.notes: Top-down brown/red spider, eight splayed legs.

cells.name: centipede
cells.notes: Top-down segmented centipede with many legs and antennae.

cells.name: blue_butterfly
cells.notes: White/cyan butterfly with blue body, wings spread.

cells.name: pink_worm
cells.notes: Pink/cream segmented worm or larva, S-curved.

cells.name: brown_shell
cells.notes: Brown domed shell with a tan band across the top; reads as a snail shell or turtle carapace — ambiguous.

cells.name: coiled_grub
cells.notes: Pink coiled body inside a brown ring; likely the snail/grub curled up. Somewhat ambiguous.

cells.name: red_gel
cells.notes: Red rounded gel/jelly lump with a white specular highlight.

cells.name: green_gel
cells.notes: Green rounded gel/jelly lump, white highlight.

cells.name: white_gel
cells.notes: White/silver rounded gel lump.

cells.name: orange_gel
cells.notes: Orange/amber rounded gel lump.

cells.name: green_slime_blob
cells.notes: Green slime splat/blob with pooled base — matches the slime mob.

cells.name: blue_slime_blob
cells.notes: Blue slime splat/blob.

cells.name: red_slime_blob
cells.notes: Red/orange slime splat/blob.

cells.name: purple_slime_blob
cells.notes: Purple slime splat/blob with pink highlight.

cells.name: green_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond/kite-cut green crystal.

cells.name: red_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut red crystal.

cells.name: cyan_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut pale cyan crystal.

cells.name: blue_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut deep blue crystal.

cells.name: purple_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut violet crystal.

cells.name: gold_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut gold/amber crystal.

cells.name: white_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut white/silver crystal.

cells.name: dark_crystal_shard
cells.notes: Diamond-cut dark grey crystal with a dull red rim — obsidian/void variant.

cells.name: green_orb
cells.notes: Green glowing sphere in a dark socket/ring.

cells.name: red_orb
cells.notes: Red glowing sphere with a small white cross-spark.

cells.name: azure_orb
cells.notes: Bright blue sphere with a prominent 4-point white star highlight.

cells.name: deep_blue_orb
cells.notes: Deeper blue sphere, small star highlight.

cells.name: purple_orb
cells.notes: Violet sphere with pink star highlight.

cells.name: gold_orb
cells.notes: Gold/orange sphere with white star highlight.

cells.name: white_orb
cells.notes: White/silver sphere with star highlight.

cells.name: dark_orb
cells.notes: Dull grey/black sphere, barely lit — void/soul orb variant.

cells.name: iron_pickaxe
cells.notes: Steel pick head on a warm wooden haft (haft up-right, head lower-left).

cells.name: small_bone_shard
cells.notes: Very small grey shaft with knobbed ends; reads as a bone fragment. Could also be a chisel — ambiguous.

cells.name: bloody_bone
cells.notes: Bone shaft with a bright red mass on one end (meat/blood on bone).

cells.name: bone
cells.notes: Clean white/grey bone with knobs on both ends.

cells.name: straw_broom
cells.notes: Wooden handle with a yellow straw bristle head.

cells.name: mop
cells.notes: Same handle with a white/cream fluffy head ringed in orange. Reads as a mop; could be a lit torch head — uncertain.

cells.name: mesh_sieve
cells.notes: Wooden handle with a flat grid/mesh head — a sieve or a fine rake.

cells.name: scythe
cells.notes: Long wooden shaft with a curved pale-teal blade.

cells.name: steel_shovel
cells.notes: Bright polished steel shovel blade on a wooden handle.

cells.name: iron_spade
cells.notes: Duller grey pointed spade blade, wooden handle.

cells.name: iron_hoe
cells.notes: Flat rectangular blade set perpendicular at the base of the shaft.

cells.name: steel_spade_wide
cells.notes: Wide angular steel blade, wooden handle — second shovel variant.

cells.name: sledgehammer
cells.notes: Blocky steel hammer head on a wooden handle; usable as a blunt weapon icon.

cells.name: steel_pickaxe
cells.notes: Curved bright steel pick head, wooden handle — the better pick of the two.

cells.name: blue_watering_can
cells.notes: Blue can with spout and handle.

cells.name: silver_watering_can
cells.notes: White/silver can with spout and handle; could be a kettle.

cells.name: cooked_meat_chunk
cells.notes: Irregular chunk, dark red mass with orange/tan highlights.

cells.name: raw_steak
cells.notes: Salmon-red cut of meat with tan fat marbling.

cells.name: meat_with_fat
cells.notes: Large tan slab of fat against a red meat mass.

cells.name: pale_mound
cells.notes: Pale yellow/cream conical mound with a shadowed base. Could be dough, flour or sand — ambiguous.

cells.name: tan_mound
cells.notes: Tan-brown conical mound. Dirt/grain/dough pile — ambiguous.

cells.name: brown_mound
cells.notes: Darker brown mound, same silhouette as 4,59.

cells.name: dark_mound_with_white_chunks
cells.notes: Dark red-brown low pile studded with white chunks (bone bits or stones).

cells.name: plain_banner
cells.notes: Tan cloth banner hung from a rod inside a wooden frame; no emblem.

cells.name: banner_green_gem
cells.notes: Same banner with a green gem emblem in the center.

cells.name: banner_blue_gem
cells.notes: Same banner with a blue gem emblem.

cells.name: banner_red_gem
cells.notes: Same banner with a red gem emblem.
